highlights.text: Seoul (3N) → Jeju Island (2N) romantic K-drama circuit
N Seoul Tower love padlock & Han River sunset yacht
VIP Gyeongbokgung in Hanbok & Nami Island speedboat
Seongsan Ilchulbong sunrise & Manjanggul lava cave

itinerary.title: Romantic Korea Honeymoon
itinerary.overview: Step into a real-life K-drama narrative where cutting-edge luxury harmonizes with ancient traditions. From Seoul's neon skylines to Jeju's serene emerald shores — with private chauffeured sedan, handpicked luxury accommodations, fast-tracked entries, and TRAGUIN curated romantic experiences.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days South Korea honeymoon (KR-002): Seoul, Nami Island, Jeju Island, Han River yacht, and Seongsan Ilchulbong sunrise.

highlights.text: N Seoul Tower Love Padlock Ceremony

days.title: Seoul — Arrival & Seoul Sightseeing
days.description: VIP meet at Incheon Airport with expedited immigration. Premium sedan to ultra-luxury Han River hotel. N Seoul Tower at dusk with custom TRAGUIN love padlock ceremony. Michelin-starred candlelit dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: N Seoul Tower observation deck, Mt. Namsan cable car, Han River evening boardwalk
Evening Experience: Love-lock ceremony at N Seoul Tower, fine-dining culinary showcase
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Signiel Seoul / Four Seasons Seoul)
Meals Included: Welcome Premium Dinner

days.title: Seoul — Dynastic Majesty & K-Culture Immersion
days.description: VIP tour of Gyeongbokgung Palace in premium silk Hanboks. Bukchon Hanok Village stroll. VIP shopping in Gangnam and Apgujeong Rodeo Street.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Gyeongbokgung Palace VIP access, Bukchon Hanok Village, Insadong, Gangnam
Evening Experience: Private sunset yacht charter on Han River with wine and live acoustic music
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Signiel Seoul / Four Seasons Seoul)
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast & Luxury Korean BBQ Lunch

days.title: Nami Island — Enchanted Romance
days.description: Scenic drive to Nami Island via private speedboat. Metasequoia tree paths. Gangchon romantic rail-bike experience. Craft cocktails on Lotte World Tower 100th floor.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Nami Island eco-reserve, Metasequoia Lane, Gangchon rail-bike, private speedboat transfers
Evening Experience: High-altitude craft cocktail session at Lotte World Tower
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Signiel Seoul / Four Seasons Seoul)
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast & Chuncheon Dakgalbi Lakeside Lunch

days.title: Seoul to Jeju Island — Coastal Romance
days.description: Premium domestic flight to Jeju. Luxury SUV along Aewol Coastal Road. Cheonjiyeon Waterfall and Jungmun Saekdal Beach sunset stroll.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Aewol scenic coastal road, Cheonjiyeon waterfall, Jungmun beach walk
Evening Experience: Exquisite seafood fine-dining with private chef on the beach
Overnight Stay: Jeju Island (Grand Hyatt Jeju / Shilla Jeju Luxury Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast & Premium Coastal Fusion Dinner

days.title: Jeju Island — Volcanic Wonders & Sunrise Serenade
days.description: Early sunrise at UNESCO Seongsan Ilchulbong. Manjanggul lava cave. O'sulloc Green Tea Plantation with private skincare workshop.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Seongsan Ilchulbong sunrise peak, Manjanggul UNESCO lava cave, O'sulloc tea plantation
Evening Experience: Farewell premium beachside campfire luxury barbecue with curated wines
Overnight Stay: Jeju Island (Grand Hyatt Jeju / Shilla Jeju Luxury Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast, Jeju Black Pork Lunch & Farewell Wine Dinner

days.title: Jeju to Seoul — Farewell
days.description: Final breakfast overlooking the ocean. Dongmun Traditional Market for souvenirs. Flight to Incheon for international departure.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Dongmun Traditional Market, Jeju duty-free lounge access
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast served in-villa

hotels.name: The Shilla Jeju Luxury Private Pool Villa

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in top-tier luxury accommodations across Seoul and Jeju
VIP entry to all palaces and monuments mentioned in the itinerary
Return premium domestic flights between Seoul and Jeju Island
Daily luxury breakfasts and designated fine-dining experiences
Complimentary champagne, love padlocks, and fresh local fruits on arrival
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground client care and assistance
South Korea tourist visa application charges
Personal expenses, laundry, premium drinks, and tips
